meta.title: Business Consulting
meta.description: Business consulting helps companies identify and fix operational problems. Vertex Consulting provides hands-on business advisory services in Strumica, Macedonia.

hero.title: Business Consulting
hero.subtitle: Business consulting helps companies identify and fix the operational problems holding them back. We assess your structure, find the bottlenecks, and build a practical improvement plan.

sections.heading: What business consulting actually means
paragraphs: Business consulting is the process of bringing in an experienced outside perspective to examine how your company operates, identify what is not working, and design a concrete plan to fix it. At Vertex Consulting, we do this hands-on — not with generic frameworks, but by understanding your specific business, your market, and your team.

Most small and mid-size businesses in Macedonia operate without a formal structure for decision-making, task delegation, or performance tracking. The owner handles everything, the team follows habits rather than systems, and growth stalls because nobody has time to step back and look at the big picture. That is exactly what we do.

sections.heading: Who this is for
paragraphs: Our business consulting service is designed for companies that are past the startup phase but stuck. You have revenue, you have clients, you have a team — but something is not working as well as it should. Common signs include:

bullets.description: Your team is busy but results are not improving
You as the owner are involved in every decision
Processes are informal — things get done through habit, not systems
Growth has stalled and you cannot figure out why
You have tried hiring more people but it did not solve the problem

paragraphsAfterBullets: If any of that sounds familiar, a structured business assessment can save you months of trial and error.

sections.heading: How we work
paragraphs: We start with a deep-dive conversation. Not a sales pitch — a real, honest discussion about where your business stands today. We ask uncomfortable questions because that is where the real answers are. From there, we map your current operations, identify the friction points, and build a step-by-step improvement plan that your team can actually follow.

What makes Vertex Consulting different is that we do not hand you a report and walk away. Goran works alongside your team to implement changes, measure results, and adjust the plan as needed. We stay involved until the improvements stick.

sections.heading: What you get
paragraphs: Every engagement produces tangible deliverables: a written assessment of your current operations, a prioritized list of issues ranked by impact, and a detailed action plan with timelines and responsibilities. We also provide ongoing check-ins during the implementation period to make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

The goal is not to create dependency — it is to build your internal capacity so your business runs better whether we are there or not. Most clients see measurable improvements within 60 to 90 days of starting the process.

sections.heading: Why local matters
paragraphs: Business consulting advice from global firms is often disconnected from the Macedonian reality. Employment laws are different, market dynamics are smaller, and business culture has its own rules. Having a consultant who operates in the same market, speaks the language, and understands local business relationships makes the advice practical — not theoretical.
Vertex Consulting is based in Strumica and works primarily with Macedonian businesses. We understand the challenges of operating in this market because we face them ourselves every day.

steps.title: Initial conversation
steps.description: A free, no-obligation call where we learn about your business, your challenges, and your goals. We ask the hard questions upfront.

steps.title: Business assessment
steps.description: We spend time inside your operation — talking to your team, reviewing your processes, and mapping out how work actually flows versus how it should.

steps.title: Strategy and action plan
steps.description: We deliver a written report with clear findings, prioritized recommendations, and a step-by-step action plan with timelines.

steps.title: Implementation support
steps.description: We work alongside your team to implement the changes. Regular check-ins ensure nothing gets stuck. We stay until the results are measurable.

items.question: What does business consulting involve?
items.answer: Business consulting involves an outside expert reviewing your company operations, identifying problems, and creating a practical plan to fix them. At Vertex, this includes direct assessment of your workflows, team structure, and decision-making processes.

items.question: How long does a typical engagement last?
items.answer: Most business consulting projects run between 4 to 12 weeks depending on the complexity. The initial assessment takes 1-2 weeks, and implementation support continues until measurable improvements are achieved.

items.question: How much does business consulting cost?
items.answer: Pricing depends on the scope and complexity of your project. Contact us for a proposal tailored to your specific situation — there is no standard package because every business is different.

items.question: What makes Vertex Consulting different from other consultants?
items.answer: We do not hand you a report and disappear. Goran works directly with your team to implement changes and stays involved until results are real. We are local, practical, and focused on outcomes — not presentations.

items.question: Do I need business consulting or can I figure it out myself?
items.answer: You probably can — eventually. The value of consulting is speed and objectivity. An experienced outside perspective spots patterns that insiders miss, and a structured approach saves months of trial and error.

meta.title: Workflow Restructuring
meta.description: Workflow restructuring redesigns how your team works — from task delegation to project tracking. Vertex Consulting builds efficient operational systems for Macedonian businesses.

hero.title: Workflow Restructuring
hero.subtitle: Workflow restructuring redesigns how your team works — eliminating wasted effort, clarifying responsibilities, and building systems that scale with your business.

sections.heading: Why workflows break down
paragraphs: Workflow restructuring is the process of redesigning how work moves through your organization. Most companies do not have broken workflows — they have workflows that were never designed in the first place. Tasks get done through habit, tribal knowledge, and constant interruptions from the owner. That works when you have three people. It collapses when you have ten.

The symptoms are predictable: missed deadlines, repeated mistakes, unclear responsibilities, too many meetings, and a team that is always busy but never productive. If your business is stuck in this cycle, the problem is not your people — it is the system they are working within.

sections.heading: What we restructure
paragraphs: We look at every process that involves more than one person or more than one step. That includes client onboarding, internal communication, task assignment, progress tracking, approval chains, and handoffs between departments or roles. For each process, we document how it currently works, identify where it breaks down, and redesign it for clarity and efficiency.

bullets.description: Task delegation — who does what, when, and how they know it is done
Communication flow — reducing unnecessary meetings and message chains
Project tracking — visible progress without micromanagement
Approval processes — removing bottlenecks without losing control
Client handoffs — smooth transitions between team members

sections.heading: The restructuring approach
paragraphs: We do not impose a template on your business. Every company has its own culture, its own constraints, and its own way of working. Our job is to keep what works, fix what does not, and introduce structure where it is missing. The result is a set of documented workflows that your team can follow consistently — without needing to ask the owner for direction on every decision.

We typically implement changes using tools your team already has or tools that are free and simple to adopt. The goal is practical improvement, not a technology project. If a shared spreadsheet solves the problem better than enterprise software, we use the spreadsheet.

sections.heading: Results you can measure
paragraphs: Clients who complete workflow restructuring with us typically report a significant reduction in the time spent on coordination and status updates. Deadlines get met more consistently, responsibilities are clear, and the business owner gains back hours each week that were previously spent putting out fires.

The real measure of success is whether your business can operate smoothly when the owner is not in the room. If it can, the workflows are working. If it falls apart, there is more work to do — and we stay until it is done.

steps.title: Process mapping
steps.description: We document every key workflow in your business — how things actually get done, not how they are supposed to. This reveals the real bottlenecks.

steps.title: Gap analysis
steps.description: We compare your current processes against best practices and identify where communication breaks, tasks get stuck, or quality drops.

steps.title: Workflow redesign
steps.description: We redesign each process with clear roles, steps, and tools. Every new workflow is documented so the team can follow it without guessing.

steps.title: Team training and rollout
steps.description: We train your team on the new processes and monitor the transition. Adjustments are made in real time until the new system becomes second nature.

items.question: What is workflow restructuring?
items.answer: Workflow restructuring is the process of redesigning how tasks and information move through your business. It clarifies who does what, eliminates unnecessary steps, and creates repeatable systems that reduce errors and save time.

items.question: How long does it take to restructure workflows?
items.answer: A typical workflow restructuring project takes 3 to 8 weeks. Simple operations can be mapped and redesigned in under a month. Larger businesses with multiple departments may take closer to two months.

items.question: Will my team resist the changes?
items.answer: Some resistance is normal. That is why we involve the team early, explain the reasoning behind each change, and make adjustments based on their feedback. Changes imposed from above fail. Changes built with the team succeed.

items.question: What tools do you use for workflow management?
items.answer: We recommend tools based on what fits your team and budget — usually simple platforms like Notion, Trello, Asana, or even well-structured spreadsheets. We never recommend expensive software unless it is genuinely needed.

meta.title: IT & Systems Assistance
meta.description: IT systems consulting for Macedonian businesses. We help companies choose, set up, and manage the right digital tools — from project management to data systems.

hero.title: IT & Systems Assistance
hero.subtitle: IT systems consulting helps businesses choose, configure, and manage the right digital tools. We set up what you need, train your team, and make sure it actually gets used.

sections.heading: The problem with business technology
paragraphs: IT systems assistance is not about selling software — it is about making sure the technology your business uses actually serves your goals. Most small and mid-size businesses in Macedonia are in one of two situations: they use almost no digital tools and rely on manual processes, or they have adopted too many tools that nobody uses properly. Both scenarios cost time and money.
The solution is not more technology. It is the right technology, configured correctly, with a team that knows how to use it. That is what this service delivers.

sections.heading: What we help with
paragraphs: We work across the full range of business IT needs — not as an IT department replacement, but as advisors who help you make better technology decisions and implement them cleanly.

bullets.description: Project management tools — choosing and configuring Notion, Asana, Monday, or similar platforms
Communication systems — setting up Slack, Teams, or structured email workflows
Data and file management — organizing Google Workspace, Dropbox, or internal file structures
CRM systems — helping sales teams track leads and client relationships
Reporting dashboards — creating visibility into business performance
Security basics — password management, access controls, backup systems

sections.heading: Our approach to IT consulting
paragraphs: We start by understanding what your team actually needs — not what looks impressive on a sales demo. We audit your current tools, identify gaps and overlaps, and recommend a simplified technology stack that covers everything without creating complexity.

Once we agree on the tools, we set them up, configure them for your specific use case, and train your team until they are comfortable. We do not leave until the tools are actually being used in daily work — not just installed.

sections.heading: When you need IT systems help
paragraphs: You should consider IT systems assistance if your team spends too much time searching for files, tracking tasks in their heads, or communicating through unstructured WhatsApp groups. If information lives in one person's head instead of a shared system, that is a risk to your business. If your processes depend on memory rather than tools, they will break as you grow.
We help businesses at all stages — from companies making their first move to digital tools to businesses consolidating a messy collection of unused subscriptions into a clean, functional stack.

steps.title: Technology audit
steps.description: We review every tool your business currently uses — what works, what is redundant, and what is missing. We also assess your team's comfort level with technology.

steps.title: Stack recommendation
steps.description: We recommend a streamlined set of tools tailored to your needs and budget. No upselling — we prioritize free or affordable options that get the job done.

steps.title: Setup and configuration
steps.description: We install, configure, and customize each tool for your specific workflows. Integrations between tools are set up so data flows automatically.

steps.title: Training and handover
steps.description: We train your team in practical, hands-on sessions. We stay available for questions during the first month and adjust configurations as needed.

items.question: What kind of IT systems do you help with?
items.answer: We help with project management, communication, file management, CRM, reporting, and basic security. We focus on business productivity tools rather than hardware or network infrastructure.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing IT support?
items.answer: Our primary service is setup and training. For ongoing support, we can arrange a monthly check-in package or recommend a local IT support provider for day-to-day issues.

items.question: How much does IT systems consulting cost?
items.answer: Pricing depends on the number of tools involved and the size of your team. Contact us for a customized quote — most small business setups are completed within a fixed-price engagement.

items.question: We already have tools but nobody uses them. Can you help?
items.answer: Absolutely — this is one of our most common requests. We audit what you have, simplify the stack, reconfigure tools for your actual needs, and retrain the team. Often the problem is setup, not the tools themselves.

meta.title: AI Consulting
meta.description: AI consulting for Macedonian businesses. We identify where AI tools save time and money, then implement them with zero disruption. Practical AI integration from Vertex Consulting.

hero.title: AI Consulting
hero.subtitle: AI consulting identifies where artificial intelligence tools can genuinely improve your business operations — then implements them practically, without disruption or unnecessary complexity.

sections.heading: AI for real businesses, not hype
paragraphs: AI consulting is not about chasing trends or implementing technology for its own sake. It is about finding specific, practical places in your business where AI tools can reduce manual work, improve decision-making, or save your team significant time. At Vertex Consulting, we focus exclusively on AI applications that deliver measurable value — not impressive demos that never get used.

The AI landscape in 2026 is overwhelming. There are hundreds of tools, countless promises, and very little honest guidance about what actually works for a business like yours. We cut through that noise. We assess your operations, identify the highest-impact opportunities for AI integration, and implement the solutions ourselves.

sections.heading: Where AI actually helps
paragraphs: In our experience working with Macedonian businesses, the highest-value AI applications fall into a few clear categories:

bullets.description: automating data extraction from invoices, contracts, and forms
AI-powered chat assistants that handle routine inquiries 24/7
drafting reports, emails, social posts, and documentation faster
turning spreadsheets and databases into actionable insights
making company knowledge searchable and accessible to the whole team
connecting tools and automating repetitive multi-step tasks

sections.heading: Our AI consulting approach
paragraphs: We begin with an AI readiness assessment. This is not a technical audit — it is a business conversation. We look at what your team spends the most time on, where errors or delays occur, and which tasks are repetitive enough to benefit from automation. From there, we rank opportunities by impact and feasibility, then present a clear plan.

Implementation is always incremental. We start with one or two high-impact AI tools, integrate them into your existing workflow, and train your team until they are comfortable. Only after the first wave is working smoothly do we consider adding more. This approach minimizes risk and maximizes adoption.

sections.heading: Why businesses in Macedonia need AI consulting now
paragraphs: AI adoption in the Macedonian business market is still early. Companies that start integrating AI tools now will have a significant competitive advantage over those that wait. The tools are more accessible and affordable than ever — many are free or low-cost — but knowing which ones to use and how to set them up properly requires experience that most business owners do not have.
That is where we come in. We bridge the gap between what AI can do and what your business actually needs. No hype, no unnecessary complexity — just practical tools that work.

steps.title: AI readiness assessment
steps.description: We evaluate your operations, identify repetitive tasks, and assess which processes would benefit most from AI tools. This is a business conversation, not a technical audit.

steps.title: Opportunity mapping
steps.description: We rank AI opportunities by impact and feasibility, then present a clear plan with recommended tools, expected benefits, and realistic timelines.

steps.title: Pilot implementation
steps.description: We implement 1-2 high-impact AI tools into your workflow, configure them for your use case, and integrate them with your existing systems.

steps.title: Training and scaling
steps.description: We train your team on the new tools and monitor adoption. Once the first implementations are solid, we help you decide what to add next.

items.question: What is AI consulting?
items.answer: AI consulting helps businesses identify where artificial intelligence tools can save time and reduce costs, then implements those tools practically. It is about matching real business problems with proven AI solutions.

items.question: Do we need technical knowledge to use AI tools?
items.answer: No. Most modern AI tools are designed for non-technical users. Our job is to select the right tools, set them up, and train your team so they can use them confidently without any coding or technical skills.

items.question: How much does AI consulting cost?
items.answer: Pricing depends on the scope of the assessment and the number of tools implemented. Contact us for a tailored proposal. Many AI tools themselves are free or low-cost — the investment is primarily in consulting time.

items.question: Is AI going to replace my employees?
items.answer: No. The AI tools we implement are designed to assist your team, not replace them. They handle repetitive, time-consuming tasks so your people can focus on work that requires human judgment, creativity, and relationships.

items.question: What AI tools do you recommend?
items.answer: It depends entirely on your needs. We work with tools like ChatGPT, Claude, automation platforms like Make and Zapier, document processing tools, and custom solutions. We never recommend a tool unless it solves a specific problem in your business.

hero.headline: Creative digital presence that converts.
hero.subtitle: Websites, social media, infrastructure, and AI — everything your brand needs to dominate online. Built by a team that moves fast and thinks bold.

services.sectionHeadline: Four ways we grow your digital presence

ctaBanner.headline: Let's build something great.

serviceCommon.defaultCtaBannerSubtext: Tell us about your project and we'll show you what's possible. Fast response, creative solutions, zero fluff.

meta.title: Web Design & Development
meta.description: Web design creates modern, fast websites that drive business results. Vertex Marketing builds custom websites for Macedonian businesses — not templates, real builds.

hero.title: Web Design & Development
hero.subtitle: Web design is more than making something look good — it is building a digital experience that earns trust, communicates clearly, and turns visitors into customers.

sections.heading: What modern web design looks like
paragraphs: Web design in 2026 is not about picking a template and filling in text. The businesses that win online have websites that are fast, visually distinctive, mobile-first, and built to convert. At Vertex Marketing, we build every site from scratch using modern technologies — Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS — because templates limit what is possible and every business deserves something unique.

A great website does three things: it loads fast, it looks professional, and it guides visitors toward taking action. Whether that action is filling out a contact form, making a purchase, or calling your office — the design should make it obvious and easy. We obsess over these details because they are the difference between a site that sits idle and one that generates business.

sections.heading: Who needs a custom website
paragraphs: If your current website is more than three years old, does not work well on mobile, loads slowly, or simply does not represent the quality of your business — it is time for a rebuild. Common signs include:

bullets.description: Visitors leave your site within seconds because it looks outdated
Your site does not appear in Google results for obvious search terms
The mobile experience is broken or awkward
You cannot update content yourself without calling a developer
Your competitors have better-looking websites than you do

paragraphsAfterBullets: We work with small and mid-size Macedonian businesses that want a website reflecting the real quality of their work — not a generic page that looks like everyone else.

sections.heading: Our approach to web development
paragraphs: Every project starts with a strategy conversation. We need to understand your business, your customers, and what you want the website to achieve before we design a single pixel. From there, we create wireframes and visual concepts, build the site in stages with your feedback at every step, and launch it on fast, reliable infrastructure.

We use **Next.js** as our primary framework because it delivers exceptional performance, built-in SEO optimization, and the flexibility to build anything from a simple business site to a complex web application. Every site we build scores 90+ on Google Lighthouse for performance.

sections.heading: What is included
paragraphs: Every web design project from Vertex Marketing includes: custom design tailored to your brand, responsive development for all devices, SEO optimization built into the code, content management so you can update text and images yourself, fast hosting on Vercel with Cloudflare CDN, and 30 days of post-launch support for adjustments and fixes.
We also offer ongoing maintenance packages for businesses that want regular updates, performance monitoring, and content additions without managing it themselves.

steps.title: Strategy and planning
steps.description: We discuss your business goals, target audience, and competitors. We define the site structure, key pages, and conversion goals before any design work begins.

steps.title: Design and prototyping
steps.description: We create visual concepts and interactive prototypes. You see exactly how the site will look and feel before we write a single line of code.

steps.title: Development and testing
steps.description: We build the site using Next.js and modern web technologies. Every page is tested across devices and browsers. Performance is optimized for speed.

steps.title: Launch and support
steps.description: We deploy the site to fast infrastructure, set up analytics, and handle DNS configuration. 30 days of post-launch support included for tweaks and adjustments.

items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
items.answer: A typical business website takes 3 to 6 weeks from strategy to launch. More complex projects with custom features or e-commerce can take 6 to 10 weeks. We always give a realistic timeline before starting.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: Pricing depends on the number of pages, complexity of features, and design requirements. Contact us for a detailed proposal tailored to your project. We are transparent about costs from the first conversation.

items.question: Can I update the website content myself?
items.answer: Yes. Every site we build includes a content management system that lets you edit text, images, and pages without any technical knowledge. We train you on how to use it before handover.

items.question: Do you provide hosting?
items.answer: Yes. We deploy all sites on Vercel with Cloudflare CDN for fast, reliable hosting. Hosting costs are included in our maintenance packages or can be managed separately.

items.question: What makes your web design different from template-based agencies?
items.answer: We do not use templates. Every site is built from scratch with custom code using modern frameworks like Next.js. This means better performance, unique design, and no limitations on what we can build.

meta.title: Social Media Management
meta.description: Social media management builds your brand presence, grows your following, and turns attention into customers. Vertex Marketing manages social media for Macedonian businesses.

hero.title: Social Media Management
hero.subtitle: Social media management builds your brand presence online, grows a following that cares about your business, and turns that attention into paying customers.

sections.heading: Why social media matters for your business
paragraphs: Social media management is the ongoing process of creating, publishing, and optimizing content across platforms like Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok to build brand awareness and drive business results. For Macedonian businesses, social media is often the single most cost-effective marketing channel available — but only when it is done with strategy, consistency, and quality.

Most businesses try social media on their own, post inconsistently, get frustrated by slow growth, and eventually give up. The problem is rarely the platform — it is the lack of a coherent strategy and the inability to commit the time needed for consistency. That is where professional management makes the difference.

sections.heading: What social media management includes
paragraphs: Our service covers the complete social media lifecycle for your business:

bullets.description: defining your voice, target audience, content pillars, and posting schedule
graphics, photos, short-form video, written posts, and stories
consistent posting across your chosen platforms at optimal times
responding to comments, messages, and building engagement
monthly reporting on growth, engagement, and business impact
optional ad management for boosting high-performing content

sections.heading: Our content approach
paragraphs: We do not post generic motivational quotes or stock photos. Every piece of content we create is designed for your specific audience and business goals. We focus on content that demonstrates your expertise, shows your work, and gives people a reason to follow and eventually buy from you.

Our process starts with understanding your business deeply enough to create content that feels authentic. We study your industry, your competitors, and what performs well in the Macedonian market specifically. Then we build a content calendar, create the assets, and publish consistently — typically 3 to 5 posts per week depending on the package.

sections.heading: Results and expectations
paragraphs: Social media is a long game. We are honest about that upfront. Meaningful growth takes 3 to 6 months of consistent effort. But within that time frame, businesses that commit to professional social media management see measurable improvements in brand recognition, website traffic, and inbound inquiries.

We provide monthly reports so you can see exactly what is working, what is not, and how we plan to adjust. No vanity metrics — we track engagement, reach, website clicks, and actual business leads generated from social content.

steps.title: Audit and strategy
steps.description: We review your current social presence, analyze competitors, and build a content strategy with defined goals, target audience, content pillars, and posting schedule.

steps.title: Content creation
steps.description: We produce platform-specific content — graphics, video, copy — aligned with your brand. You approve everything before it goes live.

steps.title: Publishing and engagement
steps.description: We post consistently on schedule and manage community interactions — comments, messages, and mentions — to keep your audience engaged.

steps.title: Reporting and optimization
steps.description: Monthly analytics reports show what is working. We adjust strategy based on data, testing new content formats and optimizing for better results.

items.question: Which social media platforms should my business be on?
items.answer: It depends on your audience. For most Macedonian B2B businesses, LinkedIn and Facebook are essential. For B2C, Instagram and TikTok typically deliver the best results. We recommend platforms based on where your customers actually spend time.

items.question: How much does social media management cost?
items.answer: Pricing depends on the number of platforms, posting frequency, and whether content creation includes video. Contact us for a customized package. We offer tiered options to fit different budgets.

items.question: How long before I see results from social media?
items.answer: Meaningful results typically take 3 to 6 months of consistent effort. You will see engagement improvements within the first month, but brand awareness and lead generation build over time.

items.question: Do you handle paid advertising on social media?
items.answer: Yes. We offer ad management as an add-on service. We create targeted campaigns, manage budgets, and optimize for the best return on ad spend. Ad budgets are separate from management fees.

meta.title: IT Infrastructure
meta.description: IT infrastructure services provide reliable servers, hosting, email, and technical systems for businesses. Vertex Marketing builds and manages infrastructure for Macedonian companies.

hero.title: IT Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: IT infrastructure is the technical backbone of your business — servers, hosting, email, domains, and security. We build it, configure it, and keep it running so you never have to think about it.

sections.heading: What IT infrastructure means for your business
paragraphs: IT infrastructure covers everything that keeps your digital operations running: web hosting, email systems, domain management, server configuration, backup systems, and security. For most small businesses, this is the invisible layer that only gets attention when something breaks. Our job is to make sure it never breaks in the first place.

At Vertex Marketing, we specialize in modern, reliable infrastructure using proven technologies. We work with Proxmox for virtualization, Ubuntu for server operating systems, Cloudflare for DNS and security, and Vercel for web application hosting. This stack is battle-tested, affordable, and scales with your business.

sections.heading: What we set up and manage

bullets.description: fast, reliable hosting for your website with automatic scaling and global CDN
professional business email with proper DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) so your messages actually reach inboxes
registration, DNS configuration, SSL certificates, and renewal management
VPS setup, security hardening, monitoring, and regular maintenance
automated backups with tested recovery procedures so your data is always protected
firewall configuration, access controls, DDoS protection, and regular security updates

sections.heading: Why businesses need managed infrastructure
paragraphs: Most small businesses in Macedonia either overpay for hosting they do not need, or underpay for unreliable services that cause downtime, slow performance, and email delivery problems. Both situations cost you money and damage your professional reputation.

Professional infrastructure management means your website is always fast, your emails always arrive, and your data is always backed up. It means you call one team when something goes wrong instead of troubleshooting five different providers. It means your technical foundation is solid so you can focus on running your business.

sections.heading: Our infrastructure philosophy
paragraphs: We believe in simple, reliable, and cost-effective infrastructure. We do not recommend expensive enterprise solutions for small businesses. We use open-source technologies where possible, keep configurations clean and documented, and build everything so that it can be maintained without vendor lock-in.

Every infrastructure project includes full documentation — if you ever want to move to a different provider or manage things yourself, you have everything you need. We build for your independence, not our recurring revenue.

steps.title: Infrastructure audit
steps.description: We review your current hosting, email, domains, and server setup. We identify vulnerabilities, redundancies, and opportunities for improvement.

steps.title: Architecture design
steps.description: We design a streamlined infrastructure stack tailored to your needs and budget. We prioritize reliability, performance, and cost-efficiency.

steps.title: Migration and setup
steps.description: We migrate your existing services to the new infrastructure with zero downtime. DNS, email, hosting, and security are configured and tested.

steps.title: Monitoring and maintenance
steps.description: We set up automated monitoring and provide ongoing maintenance — updates, backups, and quick response to any issues.

items.question: What does IT infrastructure include?
items.answer: IT infrastructure covers web hosting, email systems, domain management, server administration, backup systems, and security configuration. It is everything that keeps your digital business operations running reliably.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance?
items.answer: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance packages that include monitoring, security updates, backup verification, and priority support. The package size depends on the complexity of your infrastructure.

items.question: Can you migrate our existing hosting?
items.answer: Yes. We handle complete migrations including website, email, and DNS transfers with zero downtime. We coordinate with your current providers and handle all technical details.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: We use Proxmox for virtualization, Ubuntu Server for operating systems, Cloudflare for DNS and security, Vercel for web hosting, and industry-standard backup solutions. All open-source and vendor-neutral where possible.

meta.title: AI Development
meta.description: AI development builds custom AI-powered tools, chatbots, and automations for businesses. Vertex Marketing creates practical AI solutions using vibe coding and modern AI technologies.

hero.title: AI Development
hero.subtitle: AI development creates custom AI-powered tools, chatbots, automations, and applications that solve specific problems in your business — built fast using the latest vibe coding and AI technologies.

sections.heading: What AI development means in 2026
paragraphs: AI development is no longer limited to large companies with massive budgets. The explosion of powerful AI models, APIs, and development tools means that small and mid-size businesses can now get custom AI solutions built quickly and affordably. At Vertex Marketing, we specialize in practical AI development — building tools that solve real business problems using the latest AI technologies.

We work with large language models like Claude and GPT, automation platforms, custom chatbots, document processing systems, and AI-assisted development tools. Our approach is pragmatic: we identify the highest-impact use case for your business, build a solution quickly, and iterate based on real-world results.

sections.heading: What we build
paragraphs: Our AI development service covers a wide range of practical applications:

bullets.description: AI assistants trained on your business knowledge, deployed on your website or internal tools
automated extraction and organization of data from invoices, contracts, forms, and reports
AI-powered automations that connect your tools and eliminate repetitive tasks
custom AI tools for creating marketing copy, reports, emails, and documentation
AI-assisted business intelligence that turns raw data into actionable insights
full AI-powered applications built with modern web technologies and AI APIs

sections.heading: Vibe coding and AI-assisted development
paragraphs: We use what the industry calls **vibe coding** — a development approach where AI tools assist in writing, reviewing, and optimizing code. This allows us to build applications significantly faster than traditional development while maintaining high quality. Our developers work alongside AI coding assistants to produce clean, well-structured code in a fraction of the time.

This approach means faster delivery, lower costs, and the ability to iterate quickly based on your feedback. We can build a working prototype in days, not weeks — and refine it into a production-ready tool within a few weeks.

sections.heading: Who this is for
paragraphs: AI development is for any business that has repetitive tasks eating up employee time, customer communication that could be partially automated, data that is not being used effectively, or internal processes that need to be faster and more consistent. If your team is doing work that a well-configured AI tool could handle, you are leaving money on the table.

We work with businesses across industries — from retail companies wanting AI chatbots on their websites to professional services firms needing automated document processing. The common thread is a practical problem that AI can solve better, faster, or cheaper than manual work.

steps.title: Use case discovery
steps.description: We identify the highest-impact AI opportunity in your business through a focused discovery session. We look at repetitive tasks, communication bottlenecks, and data underutilization.

steps.title: Rapid prototyping
steps.description: We build a working prototype within days using vibe coding and AI development tools. You see and test the solution early so we can refine direction before investing in full development.

steps.title: Production development
steps.description: We build the production version with proper error handling, security, integrations, and polish. The solution is tested thoroughly before deployment.

steps.title: Deployment and iteration
steps.description: We deploy the tool into your workflow, train your team, and monitor performance. We iterate based on real usage data and feedback.

items.question: What is AI development?
items.answer: AI development is the process of building custom tools and applications powered by artificial intelligence. This includes chatbots, document processing, automation systems, and AI-assisted applications tailored to specific business needs.

items.question: How much does custom AI development cost?
items.answer: Pricing depends on complexity. Simple chatbots or automations can be built quickly and affordably. More complex applications with multiple integrations cost more. Contact us with your use case and we will provide an honest estimate.

items.question: What is vibe coding?
items.answer: Vibe coding is a development approach where AI tools assist developers in writing code. This makes development significantly faster without sacrificing quality. It means we can deliver working solutions faster and at lower cost than traditional development.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use AI tools you build?
items.answer: No. Everything we build is designed for non-technical users. We create intuitive interfaces, write documentation, and train your team. If a tool is hard to use, it is our fault — not yours.

items.question: Can AI tools integrate with my existing systems?
items.answer: In most cases, yes. We build integrations with common platforms, email systems, CRMs, and databases. During the discovery phase we assess your current tools and design the AI solution to work seamlessly with what you already have.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Vertex Consulting is a Macedonian business consultancy founded in 2018 by Goran Dinov. Two divisions — Consulting and Marketing — serving small and mid-size businesses.

hero.headline: A Macedonian consultancy built on practical results.
paragraphs: Vertex Consulting was founded in 2018 in Strumica, Macedonia by Goran Dinov — with a simple philosophy: business consulting should produce real, measurable improvements, not impressive reports. Eight years and dozens of client engagements later, that principle still drives everything we do.

In 2026, we expanded into digital marketing with the launch of Vertex Marketing — a creative, tech-forward division led by Lazar, Petar, and Andrej. Together, the two divisions give our clients everything they need to grow: strategic clarity on the consulting side, and modern digital execution on the marketing side.

We work primarily with small and mid-size Macedonian businesses, with select foreign clients operating in or entering the local market. What binds us to every client is a commitment to honesty, practical outcomes, and long-term relationships.

team.sectionTitle: Four people, two divisions, one mission
team.sectionSubtitle: Our team is intentionally small. Every client works directly with the people doing the work — not account managers or junior staff.

goran.name: Goran Dinov
goran.bio: Founded Vertex Consulting in 2018. Over 8 years of hands-on business consulting experience with Macedonian companies. Leads all consulting engagements personally.

lazar.name: Lazar
lazar.bio: Full-stack developer specializing in AI-assisted development. Builds modern web applications using Next.js, React, and the latest AI technologies.

petar.name: Petar
petar.bio: Visual designer and social media strategist. Combines creative direction with data-driven insights to build brand presence that actually converts.

andrej.name: Andrej
andrej.bio: Systems architect and infrastructure specialist. Handles servers, security, hosting, and all the technical foundations that keep client projects running.
